en.title: The Steam trial version of the classic heterochromatic war chess SRPG "Fantasy World Remastered Edition" is now available for free download!
en.summary: The classic heterochromatic war chess SRPG "Fantasy World", which has accompanied players for nearly 30 years, is now back with "Fantasy World Remastered Edition". It was officially announced today (22nd) that the Steam trial version will be available for free download from now on, and a new PV will be released at the same time, inviting players to set foot on the Farucion continent again and experience the new look of the classic work after a complete remake. <For embedded content, please go to the machine core to view it> This trial version not only includes the early plot and seven classic levels of the remake, but also simultaneously releases a new combat interface, the final character transfer and card gameplay and other core content, allowing players to be the first to experience the fully upgraded strategic charm of "Fantasy World: Remastered Edition". The Steam trial version is now available for free download. Be the first to set foot on the Farucion continent. The Steam trial version of "Fantasy World Remastered Edition" is officially open for free download from now on. Players will be able to experience the world view and plot of the game after the remake.

ja.title: 古典異色戦争チェスSRPG『ファンタジーワールド リマスター版』のSteam体験版が無料ダウンロード可能になりました！
ja.summary: 約30年にわたりプレイヤーとともに歩んできた古典異色戦争チェスSRPG『ファンタジーワールド』が、『ファンタジーワールド リマスター版』として帰ってきました。本日（22日）、Steam体験版が今後無料でダウンロード可能となることが正式に発表され、同時にプレイヤーを再びファルシオン大陸に足を踏み入れ、完全リメイク後の古典作品の新たな姿を体験するよう誘う新たなPVも公開された。 <埋め込みコンテンツについては、マシンコアにアクセスしてご覧ください> この体験版には、リメイク版の初期プロットと7つのクラシックレベルが含まれているだけでなく、新しい戦闘インターフェイス、最終的なキャラクター転送とカードゲームプレイ、その他のコアコンテンツも同時にリリースされ、プレイヤーは完全にアップグレードされた「ファンタジーワールド：リマスター版」の戦略的魅力を誰よりも早く体験することができます。 Steam の体験版が無料でダウンロードできるようになりました。ファルシオン大陸に最初に足を踏み入れましょう。 『ファンタジーワールド リマスターエディション』のSteam体験版は、今後正式に無料ダウンロードが開始されます。プレイヤーはリメイク後のゲームの世界観やストーリーを体験することができる。

en.title: Make a Deal with the Ancient God, Strategy Card Auto Chess "Hand of God" will be launched on Steam on August 6
en.summary: Billion Studio officially announced that the strategy Roguelike battle game "Hand of God" will be launched on the Steam platform on August 6, 2026. The game combines card construction and auto-chess gameplay, and players will compete with their opponents in an ever-changing battle situation. In the world of "Hand of God", every card seals the soul of an ancient creature, and every summon draws energy from forces that should not be touched. Players will become the apostles chosen by the ancient gods, build decks, arrange their troops, and compete with their opponents. The game is based on auto-chess combat and incorporates blackjack-like gameplay. Every time you draw a card, you are playing a game with the ancient gods. If you are too conservative, you will be at a disadvantage; if you are too greedy, the overflow of energy will come back to bite you. The art style of the game combines gruesome themes with unexpected cute characters: weird ancient creatures are presented in a distinct beautiful girl style. This unique contrasting combination gives the game

ja.title: 古代の神と取引せよ、戦略カードオートチェス「Hand of God」が8月6日にSteamで発売
ja.summary: Billion Studio は、戦略ローグライク バトル ゲーム「Hand of God」を 2026 年 8 月 6 日に Steam プラットフォームでリリースすると正式に発表しました。このゲームはカード構築とオート チェスのゲームプレイを組み合わせており、プレイヤーは刻々と変化する戦況の中で対戦相手と競い合います。 「ハンド・オブ・ゴッド」の世界では、すべてのカードが古代の生き物の魂を封印し、すべての召喚は触れてはならない力からエネルギーを引き出します。プレイヤーは古代の神々に選ばれた使徒となり、デッキを構築し、部隊を編成し、対戦相手と競い合います。このゲームは自動チェスの戦闘に基づいており、ブラックジャックのようなゲームプレイが組み込まれています。カードを引くたびに、あなたは古代の神々とゲームをしていることになります。保守的すぎると不利になります。欲張りすぎると、溢れたエネルギーが戻ってきてあなたを刺すことになります。ゲームのアート スタイルは、陰惨なテーマと予想外のかわいいキャラクターを組み合わせています。奇妙な古代の生き物が、独特の美しい女の子のスタイルで表現されています。このユニークな対照的な組み合わせがゲームに与えます

en.summary: Bushiroad announced today that it will end product development and related services for the character card game ``Weiss Schwarzbrau''. The final product is the booster pack ``Shoujo☆Kageki Revue Starlight'' scheduled to be released on October 16th.

zh.summary: Bushiroad今天宣布，将终止角色卡牌游戏《Weiss Schwarzbrau》的产品开发和相关服务。最终产品是计划于 10 月 16 日发售的补充包《少女☆歌剧 Revue Starlight》。

en.title: ``Ironsand'', a 4-player cooperative FPS that fights against an army of machines on a desert planet, was released on August 21st. A demo version where you can experience the beginning is also available
en.summary: Renderise announced on July 17, 2026 that it will release a new title under development, "Ironsand," on August 21. This work is a rogue-lite action FPS in which the player is led to a desert planet where the Long-Eared Tribe lives, which is exposed to the onslaught of a mechanical army.The player must uncover the truth behind the invasion and liberate the Long-Eared Planet from the invaders.

zh.title: 《Ironsand》是一款 4 人合作 FPS，在沙漠星球上与机器军队作战，于 8 月 21 日发布。还提供了可以体验入门的演示版本
zh.summary: Renderise 于 2026 年 7 月 17 日宣布，将于 8 月 21 日发售正在开发的新作《Ironsand》。本作是一款 Rogue-lite 动作 FPS，玩家被带领到长耳部落居住的沙漠星球，遭到机械军队的猛攻。玩家必须揭开入侵背后的真相，将长耳星球从入侵者手中解放出来。

en.title: The original "Gwent" is almost exactly as it is. “Gwent: The Legendary Card Game” Japanese version fan launches today
en.summary: DexkerGames today (July 22, 2026) started crowdfunding for the Japanese version of the card game ``Gwent: The Legendary Card Game'' on the board game specialty site ``Bodofun''. This work is an official product that allows you to play the mini-games that appear in ``The Witcher 3 Wild Hunt'' with actual cards.

zh.title: 原版《昆特牌》几乎与原版一模一样。 《昆特牌：传奇卡牌游戏》日版粉丝今日发售
zh.summary: DexkerGames 今天（2026 年 7 月 22 日）在桌游专业网站“Bodofun”上开始了日本版卡牌游戏“昆特牌：传奇卡牌游戏”的众筹。本作是一款官方产品，可以让你用真实的卡牌玩《巫师3狂猎》中出现的小游戏。

en.title: A total of three Galaxy bifold smartphones will be released on August 7th, including the new smartphone "Galaxy Z Fold8" which has an aspect ratio of 4:3 when opened
en.summary: On July 22, 2026, Samsung held its own event ``Galaxy Unpacked'' to announce the latest smartphones under the ``Galaxy'' brand, and announced a total of three models, including the bifold smartphone ``GalaxyZFold8.'' The domestic release date is scheduled for August 7th.

zh.title: 8月7日将发布三款Galaxy双折智能手机，其中包括打开时长宽比为4:3的新智能手机“Galaxy Z Fold8”
zh.summary: 2026年7月22日，三星举办了自己的活动“Galaxy Unpacked”，公布了“Galaxy”品牌的最新智能手机，并公布了包括双折智能手机“GalaxyZFold8”在内的总共三款机型。国内发售日期定于8月7日。

en.title: "Alien Archeologist" released on Steam on October 12th. Enjoy excavation and cleaning of artifacts on Mars
en.summary: BlackLanternCollective officially announced "AlienArcheologist" on July 22, 2026. It is scheduled to be released on Steam on October 12th. This is a game set on Mars where you can excavate and clean artifacts.

zh.title: 《外星考古学家》于 10 月 12 日在 Steam 上发布。享受在火星上挖掘和清理文物的乐趣
zh.summary: BlackLanternCollective 于 2026 年 7 月 22 日正式宣布《外星考古学家》，计划于 10 月 12 日在 Steam 上发布。这是一款以火星为背景的游戏，你可以在其中挖掘和清理文物。

en.title: Connect contradictions and overturn conclusions. The PC version of “Staffer Retro: Psychic Mystery Quest,” a mystery ADV that takes on difficult cases distorted by supernatural powers, is released today on Steam.
en.summary: TeamTetrapod and GamePia today (July 23, 2026) released on Steam the PC version of ``StafferRetro: Psychic Mystery Quest,'' the latest work in the ``Staffer'' series, which is set in a world where supernatural powers exist. The story depicts a girl who has incurred a huge amount of debt due to a certain incident, and takes on various cases in order to settle the debt.

zh.title: 连接矛盾并推翻结论。 《Staff Retro: Psychic Mystery Quest》是一款以超自然力量扭曲的疑难案件为题材的悬疑 ADV，其 PC 版今天在 Steam 上发布。
zh.summary: TeamTetrapod 和 GamePia 今天（2026 年 7 月 23 日）在 Steam 上发布了《Staffer》系列最新作品《StafferRetro：心灵神秘任务》的 PC 版，该作品以存在超自然力量的世界为背景。故事讲述了一个女孩因为某件事而欠下巨额债务，为了还清债务而接手各种案件的故事。

en.title: "Marvel Fighting Spirit" releases a guide video of "Wolverine" who fights like a beast. A rush character that overwhelms the enemy with “BERSERKER CLAW” which has various derivatives.
en.summary: Sony Interactive Entertainment today (July 22, 2026) released a character guide video introducing the character "Wolverine" appearing in the fighting game "MARVELTōkon: Fighting Souls" to be released on August 7th.

zh.title: 《漫威斗魂》发布了像野兽一样战斗的“金刚狼”的引导视频。用拥有各种衍生品的“狂战士之爪”压倒敌人的冲锋角色。
zh.summary: 索尼互动娱乐今日（2026 年 7 月 22 日）发布了一段角色指南视频，介绍了将于 8 月 7 日发售的格斗游戏《MARVELTōkon: Fighting Souls》中出现的角色“金刚狼”。

en.title: That's right, let's watch the anime: The 264th episode is ``Jadugal of the Tent'' produced by Science SARU. The story of a “witch” who stood against the mighty Mongol Empire.
en.summary: The 264th episode of ``Let's Watch Anime'' is ``Tentaku no Jardugal AWitchin Mongolia'', which is an animated version of Mr. Tomato Soup's historical manga. The production is Science SARU, and the series composition is by Kanichi Kato. The director is Abel Gongora, and Naoko Yamada, who worked on the ``K-ON!'' series, is the general director.

zh.title: 没错，我们来看动画吧：第264集是Science SARU制作的《帐篷里的贾杜加尔》。一个对抗强大蒙古帝国的“女巫”的故事。
zh.summary: 《看动画吧》第264集是《Tentaku no Jardugal AWitchin蒙古》，这是番茄汤先生的历史漫画的动画版。制作为Science SARU，系列构成为加藤勘一。导演是阿贝尔·贡戈拉，总导演是曾参与《K-ON!》系列的山田直子。

en.title: “Grand Strategy SSB2”, new scenario depicting the Cuban emergency “Caribbean Hammer” and free map “Sea Labyrinth” will be released on July 30th
en.summary: System Software Beta announced today that it will deliver a free update for "Grand Strategy SSB2" at 10:00 on July 30, 2026. In addition to distributing the new scenario ``Caribbean Iron Hammer'' and free map ``Sea Labyrinth'' based on the Cuban emergency, changes to ``Morale'' specifications will be applied to all models, expanding the range of strategies in defensive battles and endurance battles.

zh.title: 《大战略SSB2》、描绘古巴紧急状况的新剧情《加勒比之锤》以及免费地图《海洋迷宫》将于7月30日发售
zh.summary: 系统软件Beta今天宣布，将于2026年7月30日10:00免费更新《大战略SSB2》。除了发放新场景“加勒比铁锤”和基于古巴紧急情况的免费地图“海洋迷宫”外，“士气”规格的变更将适用于所有型号，扩大了防御战和耐力战的策略范围。

en.title: [Play Report] "Street Fighter 6" new character "Yasmin". Check out the ability of a rush-type fighter who continues to attack using his time and mobility as weapons.
en.summary: On August 3, 2026, Capcom will implement a new character ``Yasmin'' in the fighting game ``Street Fighter 6.'' This time, we got an early taste of its usability at a trial event held prior to its implementation. In this article, we will introduce the performance of various battle actions and the play feel that we felt when we actually touched them.

zh.title: 【游玩报道】《街头霸王6》新角色“亚斯敏”。看看以时间和机动性为武器持续攻击的冲锋型战士的能力。
zh.summary: 2026年8月3日，Capcom将在格斗游戏《街头霸王6》中上线新角色“亚斯敏”。这一次，我们在上线前举行的试玩活动中提前体验了其可用性。在这篇文章中，我们将介绍各种战斗动作的表现以及实际触摸时感受到的游戏感。

en.title: [Play report] Is skill important? Push through the level? "Splatoon Raiders" was a game that couldn't be judged just by reaching a "break in the story."
en.summary: Easy to play, even for first-timers and those unfamiliar with competitive play. As a result, I thought the response was vague, but a "challenge" awaited me after the staff roll. Let's bring you a preliminary play report of the series' first standalone spin-off, "Splatoon Raiders."

zh.title: 【游玩报道】技巧重要吗？突破关卡？ 《Splatoon Raiders》是一款不能仅仅通过“故事的突破”来评判的游戏。
zh.summary: 即使对于新手和不熟悉竞技游戏的人来说，也很容易玩。结果，我以为回应很模糊，但工作人员滚动后，一个“挑战”在等待着我。让我们为您带来该系列第一部独立衍生作品《喷射战士：掠夺者》的初步游玩报告。

en.title: ``Shift At Midnight,'' a three-person cooperative horror story about running a gas station where inhuman things attack, is now available
en.summary: Kwalee released the early access version of its new title "ShiftAtMidnight" on July 22, 2026. This is a horror simulation game in which up to three players work together to manage a gas station that is visited by non-human beings.

zh.title: 《午夜换班》是一部三人合作的恐怖故事，讲述经营加油站时遭遇非人事物袭击的故事
zh.summary: Kwalee 于 2026 年 7 月 22 日发布了其新游戏《ShiftAtMidnight》的抢先体验版。这是一款恐怖模拟游戏，最多三名玩家合作管理一个有非人类光临的加油站。

en.title: Shuhei Yoshida talks about the games he has been involved with in the keynote speech "About the wonderful games, creators, and their creativity that I have met" [CEDEC 2026]
en.summary: CEDEC2026, one of the largest conferences for developers in Japan, opened on July 22, 2025. In this article, we will deliver a digest of a lecture by Shuhei Yoshida of yosp, looking back on the game titles and creators he has been involved with from the first PlayStation to the present.

zh.title: 吉田周平在主题演讲“关于我所遇到的精彩游戏、创作者以及他们的创造力”中讲述了他参与过的游戏【CEDEC 2026】
zh.summary: 日本最大的开发者会议之一的 CEDEC2026 于 2025 年 7 月 22 日开幕。在本文中，我们将介绍 yosp 吉田修平的演讲摘要，回顾他从第一代 PlayStation 至今参与的游戏作品和创作者。

en.title: ``Memorial Vacation'', Switch 2/Switch version released. ADV set in Okinawa during summer vacation
en.summary: MAGES. today released a new title, ``Memorial Vacation,'' the story of how the angel next door turned me into a useless person. This work is an adventure game based on the TV anime ``The Angel Next Door Turned Me into a No-Good Person''. A sweet and frustrating original story set in Okinawa during summer vacation.

zh.title: 《纪念假期》，Switch 2/Switch版发布。 ADV暑假在冲绳取景
zh.summary: 法师们。今天发布了新书《纪念假期》，讲述邻家天使如何将我变成无用之人的故事。本作是以TV动画《邻家天使把我变成坏人》为背景的冒险游戏。一个甜蜜又令人沮丧的原创故事，发生在暑假期间的冲绳。

en.title: "Games and Art: Nobunaga's Ambition/Koei ​​Tecmo Games' Ambition," which re-evaluates "Nobunaga's Ambition" from an artistic perspective, is being held at the Tochigi Museum of Art until September 6th.
en.summary: "Games and Art Nobunaga's Ambition/Koei ​​Tecmo Games' Ambition - The Birth of Interactive Art" is being held at the Tochigi Prefectural Museum of Art until September 6, 2026. This exhibition re-evaluates the ``Nobunaga's Ambition'' series from an artistic perspective and approaches the artistry of games.

zh.title: 从艺术的角度重新评价《信长的野心》的“游戏与艺术：信长的野心/Koei Tecmo Games的野心”正在栃木县立美术馆举办至9月6日。
zh.summary: “游戏与艺术信长的野心/光荣特库摩游戏的野心——互动艺术的诞生”正在栃木县立美术馆举办至2026年9月6日。本次展览从艺术的角度重新评价《信长的野心》系列，并接近游戏的艺术性。

en.title: Chinatsu, a member of Delusional Angel who appears in "Zenless Zone Zero", has been turned into a deformed figure "Nendoroid". Released in March 2027
en.summary: Good Smile Arts Shanghai announced today that the action RPG "Zenless Zone Zero" figure "Nendoroid Chinatsu" will be released in March 2027, and has started accepting reservations. This product is a deformed figure ``Nendoroid'' of ``Chinatsu'' (CV: Yuka Morishima), who belongs to Delusion Angel.

zh.title: 《零区零》中登场的妄想天使成员千夏，化身为变形人偶“黏土人”。 2027 年 3 月发布
zh.summary: Good Smile Arts上海今日宣布，动作RPG《Zenless Zone Zero》手办“粘土人千夏”将于2027年3月发售，并已开始接受预订。本商品是妄想天使所属的“千夏”（CV：森岛优香）的变形人偶“黏土人”。

en.title: "Beast of Reincarnation", live trial broadcast by 2BRO. will be held today at 20:00. Game Freak's completely new gameplay is unveiled at the "fastest time in Japan"
en.summary: Happinet has announced that a live preview of Game Freak's new action RPG ``Beast of Reincarnation'' will be held today (July 23, 2026) at 20:00. This is the first time that a live preview will be held in Japan.

zh.title: 《轮回之兽》，2BRO试播现场。将于今天 20:00 举行。 Game Freak全新玩法以“日本最快时间”亮相
zh.summary: Happinet宣布，Game Freak全新动作RPG《轮回之兽》将于今日（2026年7月23日）20:00举行现场预览。这是首次在日本举行现场预览。

en.title: The Switch 2 version of "Adventure Dungeon Village 2," a simulation game where you develop your own town in a world of swords and magic, is released today.
en.summary: Kairosoft today released ``Adventure Dungeon Village 2 Nintendo Switch 2 Edition''. This work is a simulation game where you develop your own town in a world of swords and magic. The Switch2 version supports 4K resolution and Joy-Con2 mouse operation. To commemorate the release, we are holding a 10% off sale.

zh.title: 《冒险地下城村2》的Switch 2版本今天发布，这是一款模拟游戏，您可以在剑与魔法的世界中开发自己的城镇。
zh.summary: Kairosoft 今天发布了《冒险地牢村 2 Nintendo Switch 2 版》。本作是一款在剑与魔法的世界中开发自己的城镇的模拟游戏。 Switch2版本支持4K分辨率和Joy-Con2鼠标操作。为了纪念该产品的发布，我们推出了 10% 的折扣。

en.title: “Niji Pin Badge Collection Vol.1” with the Nijisanji Liver motif as a pin badge will be released on July 24th.
en.summary: On July 23, 2026, ANYCOLOR announced that a total of 11 types of pin badges ``Niji Pin Badge Collection Vol. 1'' designed with the unique motifs of their affiliated rivers will be released at 6pm on July 24th. The price including tax is 1000 yen.

zh.title: 以二十三寺肝脏为主题的徽章《虹徽章收藏 Vol.1》将于 7 月 24 日发售。
zh.summary: 2026年7月23日，ANYCOLOR宣布推出共11种徽章「Niji Pin Badge Collection Vol.1」。以所属河流为主题的“1”将于7月24日下午6点公开。含税价格为1000日元。

en.title: Added Steam store and custom category functions, and enhanced wishlist management and sharing functions. Expanded gift function
en.summary: Valve today updated Steam's wishlist and gifting features. In addition to being able to categorize your wishlist into any category, you can now share specific categories and filter results, and send gifts to an email address.

zh.title: 新增Steam商店和自定义分类功能，增强心愿单管理和分享功能。拓展礼品功能
zh.summary: Valve 今天更新了 Steam 的愿望清单和礼物功能。除了能够将您的愿望清单分类为任何类别之外，您现在还可以共享特定类别和过滤结果，以及将礼物发送到电子邮件地址。

en.title: Tears of Metal, a hack-and-slave roguelike set in the Middle Ages where up to four people work together to defeat hordes of enemies, now available on Steam
en.summary: PaperCult released the early access version of its new title "Tears of Metal" on Steam on July 22, 2026. This work is a cooperative hack-and-slash roguelike game that supports multiplayer for up to four players, in which the player cuts through hordes of enemies with a medieval Scottish battalion.

zh.title: 《金属之泪》是一款以中世纪为背景的黑客与奴隶 Roguelike 游戏，最多四人合作击败成群的敌人，现已在 Steam 上发售
zh.summary: PaperCult 于 2026 年 7 月 22 日在 Steam 上发布了其新作《金属之泪》的抢先体验版。本作是一款合作砍杀类 roguelike 游戏，支持最多四名玩家的多人游戏，玩家在游戏中与中世纪的苏格兰军团一起斩杀成群的敌人。

en.title: Washagana TV's latest video introduces the complete nutritional food ``BASE BREAD.'' What is your favorite arrangement recipe?
en.summary: On July 23, 2026, the latest video of the web program "Washagana TV" by Yuichi Nakamura and Mafia Kajita was released. This time, we will introduce a sample of the complete nutritional food "BASEBREAD" and an arranged recipe.

zh.title: Washagana TV 的最新视频介绍了完整的营养食品“基础面包”。您最喜欢的排列食谱是什么？
zh.summary: 2026年7月23日，中村悠一、梶田黑手党的网络节目《Washagana TV》最新视频公开。这次，我们将介绍完全营养食品“BASEBREAD”的样品和安排的食谱。

en.title: Pixel Smile's rhythm game "STEP THEATER" led by game commentator P-P, trial version now available on Steam
en.summary: NB Games today began distributing the trial version of the music/rhythm game ``STEPTHEATER'' developed by PixelSmile, led by game commentator P-P, on Steam. Stepping in time with the rhythm, the movie theater is brought back to life as the story progresses on the screen. In the trial version, you can enjoy two stages.

zh.title: 由游戏解说P-P领衔的Pixel Smile节奏游戏《STEP THEATER》，试玩版现已登陆Steam
zh.summary: NB Games 今天开始在 Steam 上发行由 PixelSmile 开发、由游戏评论员 P-P 领导的音乐/节奏游戏《STEPTHEATER》的试用版。跟着节奏，随着屏幕上故事的进展，电影院又恢复了生机。在试用版中，您可以享受两个阶段。

en.title: Summary of “Bushiroad TCG Strategy Presentation 2026 Summer”. Latest information on 11 titles including "Pal World Official Card Game" released
en.summary: Bushiroad held the "Bushiroad TCG Strategy Presentation 2026 Summer" online on July 22, 2026. At this event, the latest information on the company's TCG titles, including the ``Pal World Official Card Game,'' which will be released on July 30th, was released. This article provides information about the announced products.

zh.title: “Bushiroad TCG 战略演示 2026 年夏季”摘要。 《Pal World官方卡牌游戏》等11款游戏最新信息发布
zh.summary: Bushiroad于2026年7月22日在线举办了“Bushiroad TCG战略发布会2026夏季”。在本次活动中，发布了包括将于7月30日发售的《Pal World官方卡牌游戏》在内的公司TCG游戏的最新信息。本文提供有关已发布产品的信息。
